Fig. 2. Overall architecture of the DA-MSDL framework. The pipeline integrates Data Preprocessing (Step 1), Drift Detection and Adaptive Fine-tuning (Step 2), and MS-BCNN Feature Extraction (Step 3), supported by the Dynamic Memory Queue and Stable Error Fine-tuning modules.
